prompt:
A solar charge controller configuration scene: a small controller on a bench with a notebook open to a settings checklist page (illegible), and labeled-looking but unreadable dial positions and wiring check marks. Nearby are a temperature sensor lead and ring terminals, suggesting LiFePO4 profile setup and verification.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 with a near-future off-grid electronics aesthetic: soft cinematic lighting, clean cable management, no logos, no readable text, no overlays. Keep the controller and the “profile checklist” notebook page as the clear focal elements.
